finding: Kaposi Sarcoma — Liver & spleen (34% at autopsy) (DDx)

differentials.name: multiple areas of bacillary angiomatosis
differentials.raw: multiple areas of bacillary angiomatosis (= swollen venous lakes in liver)

context: ± central umbilication / ulceration (common) = "bull's-eye" / "target" lesions on BE | infiltrating linitis plastica lesion (rare) | mass enhancement greater than adjacent mucosa ← high tumor vascularity | multiple 5-12-mm nodules hyperechoic on US, hypoattenuating on NECT/CECT
